Enums.sizeEffort: ~{hours, plural, one {# hour} other {# hours}} of effort

Backlog.title: Backlog
Backlog.hintDragToTodo: Drag tasks left to Todo to start working
Backlog.emptyState: You're all caught up — no staged tasks.
Backlog.hintTapToTodo: Tap to pull a task onto the board

Empty.newDesc: Create a weekly plan to get started. Select templates, configure your schedule, and track your progress.
Empty.returningDesc: Your weekly plan has wrapped up. Here's how you did:
Empty.returningPrompt: Ready to start a new week?

Priorities.title: My Priorities
Priorities.subtitle: One-off things you want to do — not tied to your weekly plan
Priorities.hint: Drag between quadrants to reprioritize · click <arrow></arrow> to track this week
Priorities.hintNoPlan: No active plan — Create Plan to track tasks this week
Priorities.dropHint: {quadrant, select, DO_FIRST {Drop here — mark Urgent & Important} SCHEDULE {Drop here — mark Important} SQUEEZE_IN {Drop here — mark Urgent} MAYBE_LATER {Drop here — mark Maybe Later} other {Drop here}}

TaskModal.adhocBanner: Priority tasks are one-off items — they don't repeat and never expire.
TaskModal.descriptionPlaceholderTemplate: e.g. Focus on dynamic programming and graph problems

AiChat.placeholderDefault: Describe your goals or what you want to work on...
AiChat.placeholderRefine: Refine the plan — or create it below...
AiChat.inputNote: AI suggestions can be edited before creating your plan
AiChat.bannerPrompt: Need help planning? Let AI suggest task templates based on your goals and history.
AiChat.bannerSubMobile: Suggest templates from your goals & history
AiChat.createdSummary: {total, plural, one {# template} other {# templates}} added · {newCount} new, {existing} existing
AiChat.previousDraftSummary: Previous draft ({count, plural, one {# template} other {# templates}})
AiChat.welcomeNew: Hi! I'm your planning assistant. Tell me what you'd like to focus on this period and I'll draft a plan of daily and weekly tasks for you. You can refine it together before adding anything to your board.
AiChat.welcomeReturning: Welcome back! Last period you completed {completed} of {total} tasks ({completionPct}%) and earned {points} points. Your daily habits hit {dailyPct}%. Want to keep this plan, adjust the difficulty, or try something new?
AiChat.chipNewFitness: Help me build a fitness routine
AiChat.chipNewSkill: I want to learn a new skill

Errors.generateFailed: Couldn't generate a plan, please try again.
Errors.createFailed: Couldn't create the plan, please try again.
Errors.generic: Something went wrong, please try again.

Validation.frequencyPositive: Frequency must be a positive integer
Validation.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one template or one-off task
Validation.atLeastOneField: At least one field must be provided
Validation.contentTooLong: Content must be 10,000 characters or fewer

Dump.title: Dump
Dump.subtitle: Get it out of your head — noise, worries, ideas
Dump.composerHint: to dump · Enter for a new line
Dump.emptyDesc: Write anything — a thought, a worry, an idea. Dump it and move on.

Plan.createSubtitle: Set up your task templates and start a new week.
Plan.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Focus on interview prep this week
Plan.noTemplates: No templates yet. Create a template to get started.
Plan.summary: {templateCount, plural, one {# template} other {# templates}} selected
Plan.summaryWithAdhoc: {templateCount, plural, one {# template} other {# templates}}, {adhocCount, plural, one {# one-off task} other {# one-off tasks}} selected

Review.title: Review Plan Changes
Review.extremeModeDescription: Daily tasks every day including weekends
Review.addedNote: New {type} tasks will be generated starting today
Review.removedNoteWithTasks: {count, plural, one {# Todo / In Progress task} other {# Todo / In Progress tasks}} will be deleted from the board
Review.removedNoteNoTasks: No active tasks on the board
Review.modifiedNote: {hasTasks, select, yes {Existing Todo / In Progress tasks deleted} other {No active tasks to remove}} — {count, plural, one {# new {type} instance} other {# new {type} instances}} will be generated
Review.adhocRemovedNote: Will return to the Priorities matrix
Review.modeChangedNote: {description} — change applies to future daily tasks only
Review.globalNote: Done and Expired tasks are never affected by any change — your completed work is always preserved.
